name: Namyong Terminal Public Company Limited
summary: Namyong Terminal Public Company Limited provides port services in Thailand. The company operates through two segments, Seaport and Related Services; and Warehouse Service. It offers roll-on/roll-off (Ro/Ro) terminal services for liners and automobile manufacturers to transport vehicles and general cargo at A5 Terminal, Laem Chabang Port located in the Chonburi. The company also provides parking space for preparing vehicles prior to export or after import; and office and equipment rental services, as well as vehicle cleaning services. As of December 31, 2019, it had 270,027 square meters of warehousing areas; and 1,000 square meters of warehouse. Namyong Terminal Public Company Limited was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
